Demurrer For Abatement Of Action (Ccp 430.10(C); Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Demurrer
Off Calendar Aug-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gene Farber (956.1800) for plaintiff and responding party
Martin Orlick and Matthew Kenefick of Jeffer Mangels Butler & Marmaro (398.8080) for defendants and moving parties

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO UPTOWN PARKING CORPORATION'S Demurrer For Abatement Of Action (CCP 430.10(C)) is overruled, 20 days to answer. Under Leadford v. Leadford (1992) 6 Cal. App. 4th 571, 575, it appears that the Court lacks the authority to abate the action. Although the federal case is in California, the federal court's jurisdiction differs. Defendants request is properly addressed by a motion to stay. This case warrants a single assignment. Within 1 week, the parties are to advise this Court's clerk of the judge or judges whom the parties would like the case assigned to. If the parties are unable to reach agreement, they are to advise the clerk of that. The Presiding Judge will make the assignment and advise the parties. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
